title: Use Case Updates — Propagate currencyCode Through All Write Operations
description: Update SaveTransactionUseCase, SaveSplitReceiptUseCase, CreateAccountUseCase (opening balance), and GetAccountBalancesUseCase so that currencyCode is set on every transaction written, and the FX Transfer credit side uses targetAmountCents for balance calculation.
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-116' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-116' to ingest requirements

Write failing tests: SaveTransaction saves currencyCode from account; CreateAccount opening balance carries account's currency; GetAccountBalances FX transfer credit uses targetAmountCents (Red Phase)
Update SaveTransactionUseCase to accept account (or currencyCode string) and set it on the Transaction
Update SaveSplitReceiptUseCase similarly for each split line
Update CreateAccountUseCase to set currencyCode on the OPENING_BALANCE transaction
Update GetAccountBalancesUseCase.calculateContribution(): for TRANSFER type where targetAmountCents != null and targetAccountId == accountId, use targetAmountCents for the incoming credit amount
Add `@trace TASK-116` to all modified files
Run './gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest' and confirm ALL tests pass (including pre-existing ones)
definition_of_done: Every new Transaction saved via SaveTransactionUseCase or SaveSplitReceiptUseCase has a non-empty currencyCode
Opening balance transaction in CreateAccountUseCase carries the account's currencyCode
GetAccountBalancesUseCase.calculateContribution() correctly uses targetAmountCents for FX transfer credit legs
GetAccountBalancesUseCaseTest passes including new FX balance test
